top_signals.title: CME Group to sue CFTC over approval of perpetual futures, CEO tells CNBC
top_signals.summary: CME Group CEO Duffy said perpetual futures should be classified as swaps under the Dodd-Frank Act, which would form the basis of the lawsuit.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
